chapter_title.ar: باب مَوْلِدِ النَّبِيِّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ وَفَاتِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 111 – Nazool (Arrival) of the Prophet<sup>saww</sup> and his<sup>saww</sup> demise

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (189/ 5)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (189/ 5)

parts.text: أَبِي الْفَضْلِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ بْنِ إِدْرِيسَ

text: كُنْتُ عِنْدَ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ الثَّانِي ( عليه السلام ) فَأَجْرَيْتُ اخْتِلَافَ الشِّيعَةِ فَقَالَ يَا مُحَمَّدُ إِنَّ اللَّهَ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى لَمْ يَزَلْ مُتَفَرِّداً بِوَحْدَانِيَّتِهِ ثُمَّ خَلَقَ مُحَمَّداً وَ عَلِيّاً وَ فَاطِمَةَ فَمَكَثُوا أَلْفَ دَهْرٍ ثُمَّ خَلَقَ جَمِيعَ الْأَشْيَاءِ فَأَشْهَدَهُمْ خَلْقَهَا وَ أَجْرَى طَاعَتَهُمْ عَلَيْهَا وَ فَوَّضَ أُمُورَهَا إِلَيْهِمْ فَهُمْ يُحِلُّونَ مَا يَشَاءُونَ وَ يُحَرِّمُونَ مَا يَشَاءُونَ وَ لَنْ يَشَاءُوا إِلَّا أَنْ يَشَاءَ اللَّهُ تَبَارَكَ وَ تَعَالَى
ثُمَّ قَالَ يَا مُحَمَّدُ هَذِهِ الدِّيَانَةُ الَّتِي مَنْ تَقَدَّمَهَا مَرَقَ وَ مَنْ تَخَلَّفَ عَنْهَا مَحَقَ وَ مَنْ لَزِمَهَا لَحِقَ خُذْهَا إِلَيْكَ يَا مُحَمَّدُ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad Al Ashary, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Abu Al Fazl Abdullah Bin Idrees, from Muhammad Bin Sinan who said,

‘I was in the presence of Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> the 2<sup>nd</sup>, so I flowed (the discussion) of the differing of the Shias. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘O Muhammad! Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Blessed and High did not cease to be Individual by His<sup>azwj</sup> Oneness. Then He<sup>azwj</sup> Created Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>, and Ali<sup>asws</sup>, and (Syeda) Fatima<sup>asws</sup>. So they<sup>asws</sup> remained for ‘أَلْفَ دَهْرٍ’ a thousand Dahr (one Dahr equals the amount of time earth’s existence). Then He<sup>azwj</sup> Created the entirety of the things. So He<sup>azwj</sup> Made them<sup>asws</sup> witness their creation, and Caused to flow their<sup>asws</sup> obedience to be upon these, and Authorised their affairs to them<sup>asws</sup>. Thus, they<sup>asws</sup> are permitting whatever they are so desiring, and permitting whatever they<sup>asws</sup> wish, and they<sup>asws</sup> are never desiring except what Allah<sup>azwj</sup> the Blessed and High Desires’.

Then he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘O Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>! This here is the Religion which (if) one who goes ahead of it (exaggerates), would miss it, and the one who remains behind from it would be obliterated, and the one who holds it properly would preserve it. Take it to yourself, O Muhammad<sup>saww</sup>!’
en.sarwar: 4. Ahmad has narrated from al-Husayn from Muhammad ibn ‘Abdallah from Muhammad ibn al-Fudayl from abu Hamza who has said the following. “I heard abu Ja‘far (a.s.) say, “Allah, the Most High sent revelation to Muhammad (s.a.) saying, “O Muhammad I created you. You did not exist. I blew into you from My spirit. It was an honor with which I honored you when I made it an obligation on all My creatures to obey you. Whoever would obey you has obeyed Me and whoever would dis obey you has disobeyed Me. I made this an obligation in the case of Ali and those of his descendants whom I have chosen for My-self.”
